analysis: Ablation with unnormalized `V` (margin directly set to raw cosine similarity, roughly 0.81 to 1.0) on GPU 7. Result is 75.77% validation accuracy! This is a NEW BEST (+0.12% over 75.65%). It reveals that applying a high, nearly constant baseline margin (0.81) to all classes, with a slight peak (up to 1.0) for visual neighbors, provides an excellent balance of generic margin and targeted fine-grained margin. This mimics the benefits of standard CosFace-like margins for all classes while retaining the structural benefits of targeted logit adjustment.
